data.title: MATIC price expected to reach $0.45-$0.52 by Feb 2026, currently trading at $0.38 with potential bounce. 4-6 week target based on technical analysis.

data.title: DOGE may hit $0.16-$0.175 by Jan 2026 as it currently stands at $0.14. RSI at 50.91 hints at consolidation.
data.description: The current price of Dogecoin remains stable at $0.14, with experts predicting a potential rise to between $0.16 and $0.175 by the end of the month. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 50.91, indicating a period of consolidation before a probable breakout above crucial resistance levels.

data.title: BofA CEO warns of $6 trillion risk from stablecoin yields attracting bank deposits, per earnings call.
data.description: During a recent earnings call, Bank of America's CEO, Brian Moynihan, discussed the potential impact of yield-bearing stablecoins on the banking system. Moynihan highlighted studies indicating that these stablecoins could attract trillions of dollars away from traditional banks. This revelation came to light in a transcript of the earnings call.
